title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Honda Motorcycle India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Honda Motorcycle India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Honda Motorcycle India in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
